description: Foreign national individual from Nigeria designated as high-risk country, non-resident alien, Enhanced Due Diligence triggered
parsed_text:
ENHANCED DUE DILIGENCE REFERRAL FORM
Customer Name: Emeka Adeyemi
Customer Type: Individual
Date of Birth: 1984-07-22
Tax ID / ITIN: XXX-XX-6618
Residency Status: Non-Resident Alien (NRA)
Country of Citizenship: Nigeria
Country of Residence: Nigeria
US Address (Correspondent): 881 Lexington Avenue, Apt 14B, New York, NY 10065, USA
Phone: +234-801-555-0233   Email: e.adeyemi@example.ng
Occupation: Managing Director, Adeyemi Energy Partners Ltd
Employer Address: 22 Broad Street, Lagos, Nigeria
Source of Funds: Business profit distributions and investment dividends
Expected Monthly Activity: $310,000

RISK FACTORS
- Country of origin/residence classified HIGH RISK: Nigeria appears on FATF monitored list and internal high-risk country register.
- Non-resident alien with cross-border wire activity expected.
- Cash-intensive sector (oil and gas services).
- Large monthly transaction volume relative to stated income.
EDD Trigger: YES — high-risk country of origin and expected wire volume exceeding $200,000/month.

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS
Passport: NG-XXXX9912, Country: Nigeria, Expiration: 2029-04-18
Secondary ID: Nigerian National ID Card NIN-XXXX3307

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN Check: Clear — no match.
UN Consolidated List: Clear.
FATF High-Risk Jurisdiction Check: FLAGGED — Nigeria on enhanced monitoring list. EDD required per policy section 4.3.
PEP Check: No — Mr. Adeyemi is not a PEP or close associate of a PEP.
Adverse Media: No adverse media identified.

EDD ACTIONS COMPLETED
1. Enhanced source of wealth questionnaire completed and reviewed.
2. Corporate filings for Adeyemi Energy Partners Ltd obtained from Nigerian CAC; ownership confirmed.
3. Three years of bank statements reviewed — activity consistent with stated business income.
4. Senior management sign-off obtained per EDD policy.
Risk Rating: High
CDD Level: Enhanced
Review Date: 2025-07-03   Reviewer: Patricia Osei
